title: spiesia filiformis
side_effects: Spiesia filiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to stomach ulcers, nausea, and vomiting. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause kidney damage and liver failure, making it essential to use the plant under the guidance of a medical professional. If not handled properly, Spiesia filiformis can exacerbate pre-existing conditions like diabetes and high blood pressure, resulting in serious health complications.
